name: The Birdie Bar
about: The Birdie Bar is an indoor golf bar located in Louisville, Colorado, featuring cutting-edge Uneekor simulators with GSPro software. The venue combines golf simulation with craft cocktails, elevated casual dining, and a family-friendly atmosphere that includes a miniature golf course. It is designed for golfers of all skill levels, from seasoned players to first-timers, offering a social environment to play, practice, or host events. Patrons can access over 500 world-class courses, enjoy a foodie-friendly menu, and take advantage of memberships for discounted playtime.
why_golfers_like_it: Ultra-realistic gameplay with top-tier Uneekor simulators and GSPro software
Access to 500+ world-class courses without travel
Social atmosphere combining golf with craft cocktails and dining
Flexible membership options with discounted hourly rates

food_and_drink.notes: Elevated casual dining with sharables, mains, and kid-friendly options
Craft cocktails, local beers, and a curated wine list

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides golf equipment; however, you may bring your own clubs if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed, as the venue offers a full menu and bar with craft cocktails, local beers, and wine.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing time varies depending on the simulator software and pace, but typically 18 holes take 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Birdie Bar is family-friendly with kid-friendly menu options and an outdoor miniature golf course.
